Preprocess quantification data for QC reporting

Source: R/cmd_helpers.R
run_qc_preprocess.Rd

Resolves configuration (from YAML or defaults), reads the annotation, and runs software-specific preprocessing. Returns everything needed to construct a QC_generator.

Usage

run_qc_preprocess(
  indir,
  dataset,
  software,
  yaml_file = NULL,
  outdir = "qc_dir",
  project = "",
  order = "",
  workunit = ""
)

Arguments

indir

directory containing quantification output files

dataset

path to annotation CSV/TSV/XLSX

software

software key (e.g. "DIANN", "SIM"); looked up in prolfqua_preprocess_functions

yaml_file

optional path to config YAML; if it exists, used instead of generating a default config

outdir

output directory (used only when no yaml_file)

project

project ID (used only when no yaml_file)

order

order ID (used only when no yaml_file)

workunit

workunit ID (used only when no yaml_file)

Value

list with xd (preprocessed data), files (discovered file paths), and config (ProlfquAppConfig)

On this page
